title: Infosys Receives INR 1,13,59,395 Penalty Demand From Assistant Commissioner of Central Tax
detailed_summary: Infosys received communication for collection of a penalty from the Assistant Commissioner of Central tax. The total penalty is INR 1,13,59,395/- relating to alleged non-realization of export proceeds on account of write off of invoices for FY 2018-19 to 2022-23. Infosys stated there is no material impact on its financials, operations, or other activities.

key_facts.fact: Infosys received communication for collection of a penalty from the Assistant Commissioner of Central tax.
Infosys stated that there is no material impact on financials, operations or other activities of the Company.

litigation_or_regulatory_matters.description: Demand issued for alleged non- realization of export proceeds on account of write off of invoices for the FY 2018-19 to 2022-23.

important_text_spans.reason: Supports the monetary size of the penalty.

important_text_spans.text: None, there is no material impact on financials, operations or other activities of the Company.
important_text_spans.reason: Supports the company's stated impact assessment.

sample_questions: What penalty demand did Infosys receive from the Assistant Commissioner of Central tax?
What was the amount of the Infosys penalty related to export proceeds?
Did Infosys say the tax penalty would materially affect its financials or operations?
processing_notes: Marked non-material because the disclosed penalty amount is limited and Infosys explicitly stated there is no material impact on financials, operations, or other activities.
